negative: extra ears, extra tail, lowres, bad anatomy

title: 研究員風貓娘
tags: cat girl,cat ears,cat tail,dark purple hair,absurdly long hair,violet eyes,glasses,white overcoat,green sweater,white pantyhose,tight dress,scientist,high-heeled shoes
negative: lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, bad hands
note: 可作為角色 + 服裝的完整起手式。

title: 1girl 基礎角色描述
tags: 1girl,solo,looking at viewer,blush,smile,detailed face,detailed hair,shiny hair,gradient eyes
negative: multiple girls, extra arms, extra legs, bad face, bad eyes
note: 適合單角色圖。把角色名或外觀 tag 放在這組後面。

title: 正面全身構圖
tags: front view,straight-on,full body,cowboy shot,centered composition,standing,looking at viewer
negative: cropped head, cropped legs, bad composition, out of frame
note: 適合角色設計、立繪、服裝展示。

title: 動態鏡頭 / 透視
tags: dynamic angle,dynamic perspective,dutch angle,foreshortening,depth of field,blurry background,motion lines
negative: flat perspective, stiff pose, bad anatomy, confusing angle
note: 用於想要更有動感的畫面。若畫面失控，可降低 dutch angle 或 motion lines 權重。

title: 第一人稱俯視感
tags: pov,from above,foreshortening,depth of field,close-up,looking at viewer,pov hands
negative: extra hands, bad hands, cropped face, out of frame
note: 適合互動感強的畫面；pov hands 容易讓手部變形，要配合 negative prompt。

title: 室內夜景 / 柔光
tags: indoors,bedroom,night,soft lighting,ambient light,dimly lit,large window,night cityscape outside,depth of field
negative: overexposed, underexposed, messy background, lowres
note: 文件中多次出現的室內夜景風格，整理為安全通用版。

title: 夏日海邊場景
tags: outdoors,beach,ocean,blue sky,sunlight,wet,shiny skin,backlighting,reflective water,summer
negative: bad water, muddy colors, lowres, blurry
note: 適合泳裝、夏日、旅行主題。

title: 日間教室
tags: indoors,classroom,school desk,chair,blackboard,window,day,sunlight,soft shadow
negative: messy background, unreadable text, bad perspective
note: 適合校園主題。

title: 品質增強基礎組
tags: amazing quality,great quality,highly detailed,detailed face,detailed hair,beautiful detailed glow,4k,depth of field
negative: lowres,worst quality,bad anatomy,bad hands,extra fingers,missing fingers,extra limbs,blurry,jpeg artifacts,watermark,text,error

title: 通用角色圖模板
tags: 【角色名 / 原創人設】,1girl,solo,looking at viewer,【服裝】,【場景】,front view,full body,amazing quality,great quality,【畫師風格】
negative: lowres,worst quality,bad anatomy,bad hands,extra fingers,missing fingers,extra limbs,blurry,watermark,text
note: 把【】替換為角色、服裝、場景和畫風。這呼應原文件前言中「於【】處添加角色與畫風 tag」的整理方式。

title: 場景插畫模板
tags: 【角色】,【服裝】,【場景】,dynamic angle,cinematic lighting,soft lighting,depth of field,blurry background,amazing quality,great quality
negative: lowres,bad composition,bad perspective,bad hands,extra limbs,watermark,text
note: 適合想先搭建整體畫面，再逐步補角色細節。
